data.name: 脚的服務
data.detailed_description:
· This is a role-playing game!
· The player assumes the role of a beautiful female foot masseuse.
· Daily job is to look for guests who need foot massage on busy streets.
· Only female guests can be served!
· Start the foot massage once you find the guest.
· 3D model
· Characters with different styles
· Distinctive street scenes
· Novel foot massage play
data.about_the_game:
· This is a role-playing game!
· The player assumes the role of a beautiful female foot masseuse.
· Daily job is to look for guests who need foot massage on busy streets.
· Only female guests can be served!
· Start the foot massage once you find the guest.
· 3D model
· Characters with different styles
· Distinctive street scenes
· Novel foot massage play
data.short_description: Xiao Qian is a foot masseuse who searches busy streets for female clients wearing high heels and gives them foot massages. Grip the feet of the guest wearing stockings with both hands, and gradually make the guest's feel extremely happy through friction.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
